title: Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited family as a Credit Analyst in Mysuru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited:
Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited!
